conversation.content:
Extract values for these columns. Document has 0 pages.

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Region - N (%) | North America | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants from North America included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 2: Region - N (%) | North America | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial who were from the North America region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 3: Region - N (%) | South America | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial from the South America region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 4: Region - N (%) | South America | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial from the South America region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 5: Region - N (%) | Europe | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial from the Europe region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 6: Region - N (%) | Europe | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial from the Europe region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 7: Region - N (%) | Africa | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the trial who were from the Africa region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 8: Region - N (%) | Africa | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial from the Africa region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 9: Region - N (%) | Asia | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who are from the Asia region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 10: Region - N (%) | Asia | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the trial from the Asian region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 11: Region - N (%) | Oceania | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial who are from the Oceania region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 12: Region - N (%) | Oceania | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial from the Oceania region? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.

For informational columns (trial name, arms, etc.), use get_chunks_by_page([1, 2]) first. For specific columns, use search_chunks. Submit when you have enough information.
